predictions.name: JWST galaxy rotation asymmetry
predictions.observable: Clockwise/counterclockwise galaxy rotation asymmetry in high-redshift samples.
predictions.value: 66% CW vs 33% CCW; parent spin parameter a/M ≈ 0.33.
predictions.falsifies_if: No asymmetry in samples > 10⁴ galaxies, or 3σ angular inconsistency.

predictions.name: CMB cold-spot alignment
predictions.observable: Alignment of galaxy rotation spin axis with CMB cold-spot dipole axis.
predictions.falsifies_if: 3σ statistical inconsistency between the two axes.

predictions.name: Michelson phase jump at solstice
predictions.observable: Quantized phase jump in Earth-based Michelson interferometers during solstice.
predictions.falsifies_if: No phase jump in coordinated multi-site measurement at solstice 2026 or 2027.

predictions.name: Attosecond entanglement tick stability
predictions.observable: Universal lower bound on quantum entanglement formation timing.

predictions.name: Hierarchy-ratio constancy
predictions.observable: Stability of the EM-to-gravitational force ratio across cosmic epochs.
predictions.falsifies_if: Coupled α-G drift exceeds bound at 3σ in high-redshift probes.
